sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40442" key="e)pipa/rodos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπάρ-οδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40442.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">second</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πάροδος</foreign> (q.v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
